name: Beasty Karts
short_description: Unleash your Beast and Weapons to destroy your competitors in a race to the finish line.
detailed_description:
Race and destroy the competition on 10 challenging race tracks. Show off your uniqueness with an
assortment of stylish karts and skins to choose from. Change your
weapons and stop your foes in their tracks.

All that stands between you and the finish line are your
opponents, some missiles, a few bombs, and a bunch of
mines.

* 10 challenging race tracks.
* Upgradable weapons! (no additional purchases needed)
* Choose from more than 30 kart and skin combinations!
* 100 separate achievements

Race! Chase! Crash! Crossing the finish line has
never been so satisfying!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish
